The '''''Quenfis''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that served with the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==History==
[[File:Quenfis2-DFR6.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The ''Quenfis'' arrives at the location of the Katana fleet]]
During the series of battles against [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] that would become known as the [[Thrawn campaign]], the ''Quenfis'' was assigned to the [[New Republic First Fleet|Home Guard Fleet]]. The vessel was placed under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sarin Virgilio]] by [[Borsk Fey'lya]] prior to its excursion to the [[Katana fleet|''Katana'' fleet]], carrying [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Talon Karrde]] as well as Fey'lya himself. The [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] participated in the [[Battle for the Katana fleet]] that resulted when it arrived at the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet's]] location just as an Imperial task force, including the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Judicator/Legends|''Judicator'']], arrived to reclaim the rest of the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] of the derelict force.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Dark Force Rising 6|''Dark Force Rising'' 6]]
